channel.title: BlackRoad OS Changelog
channel.description: Every sprint, every milestone, every line shipped. Sovereign AI on Raspberry Pi.

item.title: Compass Session — 200 Agents, 18 Domains, OpenClaw, Amundson Framework
item.description: 200 AI agents on RoundTrip. All 18 domains + 14 subdomains live. OpenClaw forked and running. 79 forks enhanced. Amundson Framework published with 10M digits. PWA on all 45 pages. v0.1.0 released.

item.title: Meridian Session — 19 Domain Repos, 571 Repos Licensed, lucidia.earth
item.description: 19 domain repos created. DNS subdomains configured across 18 domains. 571 repos licensed proprietary. lucidia.earth shipped. Ecosystem index wired across all orgs.

item.title: Sovereignty Sprint — Self-Hosted Workers, Road Fleet, Truth Audit
item.description: All 15 CF Workers self-hosted on Octavia. 13 Road Fleet forks completed. PowerDNS deployed. WireGuard mesh 12/12. Truth Audit v2 purged all false claims. 28 agents registered.

item.title: Foundation — Unified Search, 50 AI Skills, RAG, NATS Mesh
item.description: Unified search engine with 1,383 entries. 50 AI skills across 6 modules. RAG pipeline with Qdrant. NATS mesh on 4/5 nodes. Corporate formation docs indexed.

item.title: Incorporation — BlackRoad OS, Inc.
item.description: BlackRoad OS, Inc. incorporated in Delaware via Stripe Atlas. 10M common shares authorized. EIN obtained.
